Class NfcUnitController

java.lang.Object
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller.nfc.NfcUnitController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/v1") public class NfcUnitController extends Object
REST endpoints for NFC tags and scans. Tags are managed under their owning resource (management requires resource UPDATE); a scan is a resource-independent physical event.
Author:
peter haller

  • Method Details

    • registerNfcUnit

      @PostMapping("/resources/{resourceId}/nfc-units") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<NfcUnit> registerNfcUnit(@PathVariable Long resourceId, @RequestBody NfcUnitController.NfcUnitRequest request, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • getNfcUnits

      @GetMapping("/resources/{resourceId}/nfc-units") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<NfcUnit>> getNfcUnits(@PathVariable Long resourceId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • bindTask

      @PutMapping("/nfc-units/{id}/task/{taskId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<NfcUnit> bindTask(@PathVariable Long id, @PathVariable Long taskId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • unbindTask

      @DeleteMapping("/nfc-units/{id}/task") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<NfcUnit> unbindTask(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • deleteNfcUnit

      @DeleteMapping("/nfc-units/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteNfcUnit(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • scan

      @PostMapping("/nfc/scan/{uuid}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<NfcUnitService.ScanResult> scan(@PathVariable String uuid, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Processes a scan of the tag with the given uuid (e.g. from a reader device). For a TIMETRACKER this toggles the bound task's time tracking.
